name: Category: OWASP Top Ten 2010 Category A4 - Insecure Direct Object References
description: This is a Category grouping weaknesses related to OWASP Top Ten 2010 A4 (Insecure Direct Object References). Includes CWE-22, CWE-99, CWE-434, CWE-639, CWE-829, CWE-862, CWE-863. Prohibited for vulnerability mapping.
